world.title: Trump to tell wary public that Iran war goals have been accomplished in prime-time address
world.description: The US President will give a televised speech at 1am GMT (9am, Singapore time) and is expected to reiterate his plan to wind down the war within two to three weeks.

science.title: Fins, fingers and toes: a new take on repeating body parts and how they come to be
science.description: As biologists know, nature can take its sweet time explaining itself. Andrew Gillis, associate scientist at the Marine Biological Laboratory (MBL), has been investigating how the paired fins of fishes evolved for nearly 20 years - ever since he was a PhD student with Neil Shubin at the University of Chicago. A new study from Gillis and the MBL-UChicago Graduate Research Fellowship Program doesn’t quite put the matter to rest – but it gives important insight to a broader question in evolutionary biology.

science.title: Bizarre Quantum Experiment Just Proved Atoms Can Exist In Two Places At Once
science.description: A new experiment with momentum-entangled helium atoms could help unite quantum mechanics and general relativity.

ai.title: BMC Saves ₹15 Crore Using AI To Monitor Stormwater Drain Desilting, Enhances Transparency
ai.description: BMC saved around ₹15 crore by using AI to monitor stormwater drain desilting, ensuring contractors upload geo-tagged photos and videos. Payments are withheld if AI verification fails, curbing fraud. The civic body will expand the system for pre-monsoon work, with a live dashboard for public tracking.

ai.title: In South Dakota, neighbors feel sorry for Kristi Noem’s husband
ai.description: CASTLEWOOD, S.D. — That couldn’t be him, could it? The cartoonishly large breasts. The pink spandex. The come-hither stare. “Must be AI,” a burly cattle rancher named Kevin Ruesink said as he inspected pictures of his neighbor Bryon Noem that had been published by The Daily Mail on Tuesday morning.
